title: EVOKK Set of 8 Indian Copper Balti Dishes 17cm Traditional Curry Bowls with Handles Handcrafted Copper Pots for Indian Food & Restaurant Serving
features: Traditional Balti Dish Elegance – Bring the magic of authentic Indian dining to your home with these hand-hammered balti dishes, perfect for serving flavorful curries with flair.
A Feast for the Senses – This stunning curry bowls set of 8 doesn’t just serve food – it showcases it. Ideal for both everyday meals and festive gatherings.
Versatile & Elegant Copper Pot Set – Crafted from high-quality copper, each copper pot enhances heat retention and adds a rustic charm to your kitchen or dining table.
Impress with Indian Serving Dishes Set – Whether you're serving daal, biryani, or mixed vegetables, this 8-piece indian serving dishes set delivers authentic vibes with every meal.
Functional Beauty in Every Balti Bowl – Built with side handles for easy grip and serving, these balti bowls are the perfect blend of tradition, durability, and visual appeal.
